div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 302px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
Requirements Diagram
Communication Loss in Truck Platoon

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 346px; height: 1px; padding-top: 130px; margin-left: 307px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
«requirement»
REQ-1
Communication Loss HandlingThe platoon shall safely handle communication loss between the lead truck and a following truck.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 216px; height: 1px; padding-top: 338px; margin-left: 7px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
«requirement»
REQ-1.1
Lead Truck DataA following truck shall receive speed, braking and distance information from the lead truck.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 216px; height: 1px; padding-top: 338px; margin-left: 372px;

div.div:
«requirement»
REQ-1.2
Loss DetectionA following truck shall detect when messages from the lead truck are missing.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 216px; height: 1px; padding-top: 338px; margin-left: 737px;

div.div:
«requirement»
REQ-1.3
Safe ModeThe affected following truck shall switch to safe driving mode.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 216px; height: 1px; padding-top: 468px; margin-left: 117px;

div.div:
«requirement»
REQ-1.4
Safe DistanceThe affected following truck shall increase its distance from the truck in front.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 216px; height: 1px; padding-top: 468px; margin-left: 637px;

div.div:
«requirement»
REQ-1.5
RecoveryThe affected following truck shall reconnect or leave the platoon safely.
